overview: A premium multi-page website for Cutie π, a modern creative design studio offering graphic design, video editing, and website development. Features a full-screen intro splash, home page with portfolio previews and testimonials, services showcase, portfolio gallery, contact form, and about page — all with smooth animations and electric blue branding.
features: Full-screen intro splash page with animated Explore button
Multi-page navigation with header and footer
Home page with hero, about preview, services cards, portfolio grid, and testimonials
Services page with active and coming-soon badges
Portfolio gallery with category filter tabs and lightbox
Contact form with file upload, WhatsApp button, and email display
About page with agency-style studio vision
Electric Blue accent with clean minimal typography
